title: croton standleyanus
intro: Croton standleyanus, also known as the Philippine croton or Croton, is a species of plant in the Euphorbiaceae family, native to the Philippines. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fever. The health benefits of Croton standleyanus include its potential to treat various ailments such as rheumatism, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its extracts have been used in various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments.
